subject: What's New with AIM?

  Enjoy all of the same great AIM features you know and love.

name. Start using it as your email address!
AIM Mail gives you quick access to everything you need to stay in touch -
e-mail, AIM, content, contacts, pictures, and more!

Start Now! [http://message.aim.com/cgi-bin25/DM/y/hx3y0BTnFv50NIc0Qfe0Ec]

body_html:
Add the features you want with AIM Plugins! Get games, stocks, and much more.  
  Send pictures to your buddy's cell phone from your AIM desktop.  
  Enjoy all of the same great AIM features you know and love.

Find Out More!
  

Your friends already know your screen name. Start using it as your email address!
AIM Mail gives you quick access to everything you need to stay in touch - e-mail, AIM, content, contacts, pictures, and more!
Start Now!       
   
 
Manage your Buddy List from your mobile phone. Read and send IMs and check e-mail in your AIM Mail Inbox or other AOL mail folders.

Start Now!
